snippet.title: Dora and the Lost City of Gold (2019) - New Official Trailer - Paramount Pictures
snippet.description:
If you think you know Dora…think again! 🎒 Dora’s going on her biggest adventure yet in the new trailer for Dora and the Lost City of Gold, in theatres August 9! #DoraMovie

Having spent most of her life exploring the jungle with her parents, nothing could prepare Dora (Isabela Moner) for her most dangerous adventure ever – High School. Always the explorer, Dora quickly finds herself leading Boots (her best friend, a monkey), Diego (Jeffrey Wahlberg), a mysterious jungle inhabitant (Eugenio Derbez), and a rag tag group of teens on a live-action adventure to save her parents (Eva Longoria, Michael Peña) and solve the impossible mystery behind a lost city of gold.

http://facebook.com/DoraMovie

http://instagram.com/DoraMovie
